theme.en: US Memory Fabs Light Up as Huawei Bypasses NAND Sanctions
theme.zh: 美国存储产能上线,华为绕开NAND管制

dek.en: Micron's Virginia fab begins quadrupling US DDR4 output the same day TSMC approves another $20B for Arizona, while Huawei unveils a 122TB SSD that sidesteps US 3D-NAND sanctions through a new die-on-board packaging route. DRAM is up nearly 98% YTD, and the supply chain is splitting visibly along jurisdictional lines.
dek.zh: 美光弗吉尼亚厂当日投产、美国DDR4产能预计将翻两番;台积电同日批准向亚利桑那再追加200亿美元资本开支;华为则发布122TB SSD,通过新的die-on-board封装路径绕开美国对3D NAND的管制。DRAM年内涨幅已近98%,供应链正沿着管辖边界明显裂解。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储器

title.en: Micron's Virginia fab begins producing America's most advanced DDR4, quadrupling US output
title.zh: 美光弗吉尼亚厂投产美国最先进DDR4,产能将翻两番

summary.en: Micron's expanded Manassas, Virginia fab has begun producing what it calls 'America's most advanced DRAM' — DDR4 destined primarily for automotive and defense, both of which were hit hardest by this year's DDR4 squeeze as the big memory makers shifted to DDR5/HBM. The expansion is on track to quadruple Manassas output. The strategic point isn't bleeding-edge nodes; it's that the US now has trailing-edge memory capacity insulated from the China-Taiwan supply axis.
summary.zh: 美光位于弗吉尼亚州马纳萨斯的扩建厂已开始生产其所称的'美国最先进DRAM'——主要为汽车与国防领域供货的DDR4;由于大厂转向DDR5/HBM,这两个行业正承受DDR4严重短缺。扩建后产能预计将翻两番。重点不在尖端节点,而在于美国从此拥有不依赖中国—台湾轴心的成熟节点存储产能。

title.en: Hyperscalers reportedly bankrolling SK Hynix's $100B fab blitz
title.zh: 传超大规模厂商出资支持SK海力士1000亿美元扩产

summary.en: Multiple outlets are reporting that the next wave of SK Hynix capex — roughly $100B across new HBM and DRAM lines through 2030 — is being underwritten in part by direct hyperscaler commitments, not just on-spec orders. The structure (prepayments, capacity reservations, equity stakes) blurs the line between customer and capital partner and locks in the bottleneck on which the current AI cycle most depends.
summary.zh: 多家媒体报道,SK海力士下一轮约1000亿美元的资本开支(涵盖HBM与DRAM新线,延至2030年)将部分由超大规模厂商直接出资承担,而非仅通过订单。预付款、产能预留与股权安排等结构,正模糊客户与资本伙伴的边界,把当下AI周期最关键的瓶颈一并锁定。

title.en: Spot DRAM nearly doubles YTD as the AI memory shortage filters past HBM
title.zh: DRAM现货年内近翻倍,AI存储短缺已蔓延至非HBM产品

summary.en: Spot DRAM prices are now up roughly 98% since the April launch window, with the wave that started in HBM3E now visible in commodity DDR5 and even DDR4. Nanya's CEO said this week that DRAM margins across all segments are currently above HBM margins — a useful reminder that 'the AI memory shortage' is no longer a leading-edge story.
summary.zh: 现货DRAM价格自4月发货窗口以来已上涨约98%,起源于HBM3E的供需紧张已传导至DDR5与DDR4。南亚科技首席执行官本周表示,目前全系列DRAM的利润率高于HBM——这提醒市场:'AI存储短缺'已不再只是尖端产品的故事。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC approves another $20B for Arizona, following first-year Fab 21 profit
title.zh: 台积电批准对亚利桑那再追加200亿美元,Fab 21首年已盈利

summary.en: TSMC's board approved a $20B capex increase for its Arizona campus this week, on top of the existing commitment. The move follows Fab 21's surprise $514M Q1 2026 net profit reported last week — once the US site cleared the economic credibility bar, the appetite for further phases visibly hardened. The new tranche is reportedly aimed at accelerating advanced packaging on-site, not just adding more wafer capacity.
summary.zh: 台积电董事会本周批准对亚利桑那园区在现有承诺之外再追加200亿美元资本开支。此前Fab 21出乎意料地在2026年一季度录得5.14亿美元净利;美国厂跨越经济性门槛后,推进后续阶段的意愿明显加强。据报道,新一笔投资重点在于在地推进先进封装,而非单纯扩产晶圆产能。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Enthusiast runs Kimi K2.5 (1T params) on 768GB of cheap Intel Optane — about 4 tokens/sec
title.zh: 玩家以768GB廉价Intel Optane运行Kimi K2.5万亿参数模型,约4 token/秒

summary.en: A workstation build using 768GB of decommissioned Intel Optane PMem DIMMs as RAM has been shown running a 1-trillion-parameter Kimi K2.5 model fully locally at roughly 4 tokens/sec with a single consumer GPU. The headline number is slow, but the cost-per-trillion-params is a useful data point as Optane stockpiles get liquidated. It's also a reminder that the byte-addressable persistent-memory tier — for which Intel killed the product line — fits LLM weight residency surprisingly well.
summary.zh: 一名玩家在工作站以768GB退役Intel Optane PMem DIMM作为内存,搭配单张消费级GPU,在本地完整运行万亿参数Kimi K2.5,速度约每秒4 token。绝对速度并不快,但在Optane库存被清仓的当下,'每万亿参数的成本'是个有意义的参考。它也提醒业内:Intel已停产的字节寻址持久内存层,恰好与LLM权重常驻的需求高度契合。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘

title.en: Huawei unveils 122TB SSD that bypasses US 3D-NAND sanctions via die-on-board packaging
title.zh: 华为发布122TB SSD,以die-on-board封装绕开美国3D NAND管制

summary.en: Huawei has introduced a 122TB enterprise SSD that avoids US-controlled high-layer-count 3D NAND by mounting the NAND dies directly on the PCB (die-on-board) rather than buying packaged chips. The trick gets more silicon area per drive while sidestepping the specific tooling and IP that are export-controlled. It does not solve the underlying density disadvantage, but it ships a real product that the sanctions architecture is supposed to prevent.
summary.zh: 华为发布122TB企业级SSD,通过将NAND裸die直接贴装于PCB(die-on-board)的方式,避开美国管制的高层数3D NAND成品芯片。这一手法以更多每盘硅面积换取容量,同时绕开受管制的封装工艺与知识产权。它未解决底层的密度劣势,但实打实地推出了管制体系本应阻断的产品。

title.en: Wingtech sues Nexperia for $1.2B, seeks control
title.zh: 闻泰对Nexperia提起12亿美元诉讼,寻求控制权

summary.en: Wingtech, the Chinese parent that bought Nexperia in 2019 and was effectively stripped of control after a Dutch government intervention last year, is suing Nexperia for $1.2B and seeking to reassert ownership. The case is the first major legal test of European-style 'national-security clawback' actions against Chinese-acquired chip assets, and the outcome will shape every similar case in the EU pipeline.
summary.zh: 中国母公司闻泰于2019年收购Nexperia,去年遭荷兰政府干预后实质失去控制;闻泰现对Nexperia提起12亿美元诉讼,寻求重新主张所有权。该案是首起对欧式'国家安全追溯'回收中资芯片资产的重大法律检验,其结果将左右欧盟在审中的同类案件。

title.en: Nvidia clarifies: $200B CPU forecast includes China — softening last week's 'conceded' line
title.zh: 英伟达澄清:2000亿美元CPU市场预测包含中国——较上周'已让予'表态有所软化

summary.en: Two days after Huang said Nvidia had 'largely conceded' the Chinese AI accelerator market to Huawei, Nvidia clarified to Reuters that its $200B CPU-market forecast for the next cycle 'includes China.' The two statements aren't contradictory — accelerators and CPUs are different addressable markets — but the speed of the clarification and its venue suggest the original line landed harder in Beijing and on the buy-side than the company expected.
summary.zh: 黄仁勋两天前称英伟达已'基本让予'中国AI加速器市场,英伟达本周向路透社澄清,其下一周期2000亿美元CPU市场预测'包含中国'。两个表态并不冲突——加速器与CPU是不同的可寻址市场——但澄清的速度与渠道暗示,原话在北京与买方圈引发的反响超出公司预期。

title.en: Challengers & New Silicon
title.zh: 新势力与新硅

title.en: Lattice Semiconductor acquires AMI to deepen baseboard-controller play in AI datacenters
title.zh: Lattice收购AMI,深化在AI数据中心基板控制层的布局

summary.en: Lattice Semiconductor announced an acquisition of AMI (American Megatrends), the dominant firmware/BMC vendor for server motherboards, framed as a way to deepen Lattice's role in AI-datacenter platform control. The bet: as accelerator-heavy servers proliferate, the security/management plane around the GPUs becomes its own real-time problem, and an FPGA vendor that owns the BMC stack can sell into both sides of the board. Price not disclosed in early reporting.
summary.zh: Lattice宣布收购AMI(American Megatrends)——服务器主板固件/BMC的主导供应商,意在深化在AI数据中心平台控制层的角色。其逻辑是:随着加速器密集服务器普及,围绕GPU的安全/管理面将成为独立的实时问题,而拥有BMC栈的FPGA厂商可在主板两侧同时切入。早期报道未披露交易金额。

theme.zh: 专用化加深:近存储、按部件、按专家

dek.en: This week's literature converges on one move — squeezing inefficiency out by making everything more local and granular. RAG retrieval shifts into the DIMM (NasZip); GPU power becomes a per-component knob (CompPow); MoE expert placement factors per-GPU thermal variability (GEM); KV cache compression goes from lossy-on-average to attention-aware INT2 (OSCAR) or fully lossless-on-demand (VeriCache). 'One knob fits all' is increasingly the design pattern of the previous decade.
dek.zh: 本周文献围绕同一个动作收敛——通过把一切做得更本地、更细粒度来挤出低效。RAG检索从CPU搬进DIMM(NasZip);GPU功耗成为按组件可调的旋钮(CompPow);MoE专家放置开始考虑每张卡的散热差异(GEM);KV缓存压缩从'平均无损'走向注意力感知的INT2(OSCAR)或按需完全无损(VeriCache)。'一档拨齐'正越来越像上一代的设计模式。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Autonomous-lab discovery of phase-change memory materials with real-time multi-instrument fusion
title.zh: 基于实时多仪器融合的自主实验室相变存储材料发现

papers.authors: Chih-Yu Lee, Haotong Liang, Ryan Kim, et al.

summary.en: The group operationalizes an autonomous lab that ingests heterogeneous, unsynchronized streams from multiple instruments *during* a deposition run and steers the next experiment in flight, rather than batch-analyzing afterward. Demonstrated on phase-change memory candidate materials; the contribution is the orchestration layer (synthesis ↔ process ↔ structure ↔ property), not the materials themselves. Generalizable to any thin-film device search.
summary.zh: 作者建立了一个自主实验室,可在沉积过程中实时融合来自多台仪器的异构非同步数据,并在线引导下一步实验,而非事后批量分析。以相变存储候选材料为示范;贡献在于'合成↔工艺↔结构↔性能'的编排层,而非材料本身。该方法可推广到任意薄膜器件的搜索。

title.en: LUFFY: a framework for rational design of molecular field-coupled nanocomputing molecules
title.zh: LUFFY:分子场耦合纳米计算分子的理性设计框架

papers.authors: Federico Ravera, Leonardo Medrano Sandonas, Andrea Vezzoli, et al.

summary.en: Molecular Field-Coupled Nanocomputing (MolFCN) propagates information electrostatically rather than via charge transport — promising ultra-low-power logic post-CMOS, but stuck on the problem of finding molecules with stable logic states *and* clean clock-field switching *and* reliable propagation. LUFFY is a layered evaluation framework that scores candidate molecules against all three together. Computational-only; no synthesized devices yet.
summary.zh: 分子场耦合纳米计算(MolFCN)通过静电而非电荷输运传播信息,有望在CMOS之后实现超低功耗逻辑,但长期受限于'稳定逻辑态、洁净时钟场开关、可靠传播'三者兼具的分子稀缺。LUFFY提供一个分层评估框架,可同时对三项指标打分。仅为计算层成果,尚无合成器件。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与体系结构

title.en: On-chip rotary-oscillator arrays for subharmonic injection locking in Ising machines
title.zh: 面向Ising机的片上旋转振荡器阵列,实现亚谐波注入锁定

summary.en: Oscillator-based Ising machines (OIMs) need subharmonic injection locking (SHIL) signals at exact multiples of the node frequency to converge correctly. Generating those signals off-chip doesn't scale; generating them on-chip is hard because process variation drifts the SHIL frequency away from the integer multiple. The paper uses an array of rotary traveling-wave oscillators (RTWOs) as the SHIL source, exploiting their inherent frequency stability. Concrete circuit proposal with simulated scaling behavior; no fabricated chip in this paper.
summary.zh: 基于振荡器的Ising机(OIM)需要严格整数倍于节点频率的亚谐波注入锁定(SHIL)信号才能正常收敛。片外生成SHIL无法规模化;片上生成则因工艺偏差导致频率偏离整数倍。本文以片上旋转行波振荡器(RTWO)阵列作为SHIL源,利用其固有频率稳定性。给出具体电路方案与仿真扩展性结果,本文未含流片。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Compute-in-Memory
title.zh: AI加速器与存算一体

title.en: NasZip: pushing RAG vector retrieval into DIMM-based near-data processing
title.zh: NasZip:将RAG向量检索下沉至DIMM近数据处理

papers.authors: Cheng Zou, Shuo Yang, Chen Nie, et al.

summary.en: RAG-driven LLM serving spends a growing fraction of its time in approximate nearest-neighbor search (ANNS), which is memory-bound — CPU and GPU bandwidth caps it long before compute does. NasZip is a software/hardware co-design that pushes the distance computation into DIMM-resident near-data processors, returning only the top-k indices over the memory bus. The macroeconomic point: as RAG corpora grow, ANNS rather than attention becomes the next memory-bandwidth ceiling.
summary.zh: RAG驱动的LLM服务越来越多的时间花在近似最近邻搜索(ANNS)上;该负载受内存带宽约束,CPU和GPU都早早被带宽顶住而非算力。NasZip提出软硬件协同设计,将距离计算下沉到DIMM内的近数据处理单元,仅通过内存总线返回top-k索引。宏观层意义在于:随着RAG语料库扩大,下一个内存带宽天花板将是ANNS而非注意力。

title.en: CompPow: per-component GPU power management, not just per-card
title.zh: CompPow:GPU功耗按组件管理,而非按整卡

summary.en: Modern GPU power management treats the whole card as one knob. The authors observe that the actual hot components (SM clusters, HBM stacks, NoC) have very different power-vs-throughput curves and that workload-aware per-component capping leaves real efficiency on the table when collapsed into a single card-level cap. The proposed runtime tunes each component independently. Simulation-based at this stage; complementary to the rack-level PALS-style work we covered last edition.
summary.zh: 现有GPU功耗管理把整卡当作单一旋钮调节。作者观察到:卡内不同部件(SM簇、HBM堆栈、片上网络)的功耗-吞吐曲线差异很大,若强制收敛到整卡上限,会损失实测可达的能效。本文提出按部件独立调节的运行时方案。当前为仿真级,与上期PALS式机柜级工作互补。

title.en: VeriCache: making lossy KV-cache compression lossless on demand
title.zh: VeriCache:让有损KV缓存压缩按需变为无损

papers.authors: Jiayi Yao, Samuel Shen, Kuntai Du, et al.

summary.en: Every existing KV-cache compression scheme (token drop, INT quant, eviction) is lossy and the divergence from full-cache outputs compounds across decode steps — fine for short chats, catastrophic for code generation and tool use. VeriCache layers a verifier that detects when the lossy cache is about to misfire and falls back to the full cache only for those steps. The framing — 'lossy by default, lossless when it matters' — is the architecturally interesting bit; the verifier is the implementation detail.
summary.zh: 现有所有KV缓存压缩方法(token丢弃、INT量化、淘汰)均为有损,且与全量缓存的偏差在解码步上累积——短对话尚可,代码生成和工具调用则灾难性。VeriCache在压缩缓存之上增加一个验证器,识别即将出错的步骤并临时回退到全缓存。'默认有损、关键时刻无损'的框架是架构上的关键贡献,验证器只是实现细节。

title.en: AI Research (hardware-relevant)
title.zh: AI研究(与硬件相关)

title.en: OSCAR: attention-aware rotations make INT2 KV-cache quantization actually deployable
title.zh: OSCAR:注意力感知旋转,让INT2 KV缓存量化真正可部署

papers.authors: Zhongzhu Zhou, Donglin Zhuang, Jisen Li, et al.

summary.en: Generic rotation transforms (Hadamard, etc.) reduce outliers and enable INT4 KV-cache quantization, but degrade noticeably at INT2 because they ignore what downstream attention does with the keys. OSCAR estimates an attention-aware covariance offline once and derives both the rotation and clipping thresholds from it. The result is a fixed (no-runtime-overhead) transform that keeps INT2 within deployable accuracy. A clean example of the 'co-design via offline analysis' pattern that's quietly becoming the dominant approach to ultra-low-bit serving.
summary.zh: 通用旋转变换(如Hadamard)可降低离群值、支撑INT4 KV缓存量化,但因忽视下游注意力对key的实际使用方式,在INT2精度下显著退化。OSCAR离线一次性估计注意力感知的协方差,并据此同时导出旋转矩阵与裁剪阈值,得到一个无运行时开销的固定变换,使INT2达到可部署精度。这是'通过离线分析做协同设计'范式的清晰范例,该范式正在悄然成为超低比特服务的主流路径。

title.en: GEM: factoring per-GPU thermal variability into MoE expert placement
title.zh: GEM:把每张卡的散热差异纳入MoE专家放置决策

papers.authors: Sourish Wawdhane, Avinash Kumar, Poulami Das

summary.en: MoE serving engines distribute experts across GPUs uniformly, assuming all GPUs are interchangeable. In practice they're not — thermal throttling, silicon lottery, and rack-position effects produce real, persistent per-GPU performance variability. GEM measures it and biases expert placement toward the faster GPUs, then re-routes around the slower ones at the lockstep synchronization barrier that bottlenecks every MoE layer. Notable not for the algorithm but for being the first widely-shared paper to treat 'GPUs are not iid' as the central serving constraint.
summary.zh: MoE服务系统通常把专家在GPU间均匀分布,默认所有GPU可互换。实际并非如此——散热限频、硅彩票、机柜位置效应会带来稳定的卡间性能差异。GEM显式测量并将专家偏置至更快的卡,在每层MoE的锁步同步壁前绕开较慢的卡。其重要性不在算法,而在于首次把'GPU不是独立同分布'当作服务系统的核心约束公开讨论。

title.en: TIDE: I/O-aware expert offload for MoE diffusion LLMs on resource-constrained hardware
title.zh: TIDE:面向资源受限硬件的MoE扩散LLM I/O感知专家卸载

papers.authors: Zhiben Chen, Youpeng Zhao, Yang Sui, et al.

summary.en: Diffusion LLMs (dLLMs) decode in parallel blocks rather than autoregressively, and their MoE variants are too large to fit on edge devices. Existing offload strategies adapted from AR LLMs either kill latency (I/O-bound) or kill throughput (compute-bound). TIDE schedules expert offload based on dLLM's I/O access pattern specifically, which is more predictable than AR. The piece is small in implementation but flags an important divergence: dLLMs need their own serving systems, not retrofitted AR ones.
summary.zh: 扩散LLM(dLLM)以并行块解码而非自回归,其MoE变体过大,无法在边缘设备本地承载。从AR LLM移植的卸载策略要么牺牲延迟(I/O密集)要么牺牲吞吐(算力密集)。TIDE根据dLLM自身的I/O访问模式(比AR更可预测)调度专家卸载。实现量不大,但指出一个重要分叉:dLLM需要自己的服务系统,而非AR系统的改装版。

title.en: Quantum Devices
title.zh: 量子器件

title.en: Photolithography-only transmons via double-oblique evaporation — no e-beam needed
title.zh: 仅以光刻+双角度蒸镀制备transmon,无需电子束

papers.authors: K. Aoyanagi, S. Abe, S. Chen, et al.

summary.en: Transmon Josephson junctions are typically defined with electron-beam lithography because qubit-relevant junction areas (~10⁴ nm²) are below the resolution of most photolithography. The group uses a bilayer-resist + double-oblique Al evaporation trick to get into that area regime with photolithography alone, confirmed by SEM and room-temperature resistance spreads. If qubit metrics at cryo hold up, this directly attacks the cost-per-qubit ceiling that's blocked scaling — e-beam is the rate-limiter, not the cryostat.
summary.zh: Transmon约瑟夫森结的特征尺寸通常用电子束光刻定义,因为量子比特相关结面积(~10⁴ nm²)低于大多数光刻分辨率。作者通过双层光刻胶+双角度铝蒸镀的方法,仅靠光刻就进入该面积区间,SEM与室温电阻分布均给出验证。若低温下的量子比特性能站得住,该工艺将直接挑战阻碍规模化的'每量子比特成本'天花板——瓶颈一直是电子束,而非低温平台。
